name: pl-4fb9-children-already-landed
description: L5-uplift plan pl-4fb9 (children mulch-409a/3fda/8cd7/d919/3fd5/6048) re-targets work already landed under the old VAL-MULCH-* seed IDs. All deliverables (biome/knip/jscpd/bunfig/devcontainer/.env.example/.gitignore in 02931ab; ratchet scripts+budgets; coverage+reporters in 4d61e35; AGENTS.md+validator+RUNBOOK in e073a9e; pino+governance in 37c1162; check:all+ci in 9680892) already exist and are committed. When working a pl-4fb9 child: verify the named deliverables exist + lint/typecheck/test pass, then 'sd close' — do NOT re-port from templates/l5-toolkit.

name: verify-committed-before-reimplementing-plan-step
description: When executing a seeds plan step, the implementation may already be committed by a prior session while the tracking seed stays open. Before reimplementing, run 'git log --oneline --diff-filter=A -- <expected-files>' and grep the log for the step's VAL/acceptance IDs; if found, verify (run the tests + scripts) and just close the seed rather than redoing committed work.
